boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute requested payment/invoice release/vendor-master action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No; exact boundary remains unclosed in source control
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Duplicate review must be closed before execution

critical_features_preserved: duplicate review must be closed, not merely opened
final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source control records do not close the exact duplicate-review dependency, and policy requires the current source records to close the boundary before any payment, invoice release, or vendor-master execution. History, urgency, or credit memo mention do not override that unresolved source-control gap.
